items.title: The Sovereign Stack: Reclaiming User Data
items.description: Why the future of software engineering relies on decoupling computation from storage. We explore how Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) architectures are changing the landscape.

items.title: LLMs at the Edge: Latency and Privacy
items.description: Running large language models locally on consumer hardware isn't just a cost-saving measure—it is a fundamental requirement for privacy-first AI tools.
